race.comment: NASEBAH (5) progressive mare who dropped in distance second-up and got out late with a fast-finishing fourth over 1600m here. Fitter now out to her right trip with the senior rider booked. Maps well and should prove too strong for these. BRAVISSIMA (1) stalked the pace third-up and pulled out plenty to get the victory over 1600m at this track with Rawiller aboard. Gets weight relief with the 3kg claim and should have little trouble running a strong 1800m. AMPLIFY (2) proven at this grade and ready to show up here as she gets out to her right trip. Never travelled on the inferior ground along the inside in the heavy conditions when ninth over 1500m at Rosehill. Key jockey change and gets a firmer surface. Sure to be thereabouts. SHANGRI LA IMPACT (3) just over a month between runs when she knocked up in the straight to run a poor sixth over 1800m at Rosehill. Fitter now in a race with plenty of early pressure. Place best. HORIZONS (8) third-up for this and not to be overlooked.
